TemplateId.description: Required identifier or name of an AI template whose source is Profile. The template is applied first, then any properties in this object override the generated profile.

ItemId.description: Optional unique identifier. If provided, used to find an existing profile to update.

Source.description: Overrides the AI provider source name.

DisplayText.description: Overrides the human-readable profile display name.

WelcomeMessage.description: Overrides the initial greeting shown to users.

TitleType.description: Overrides how the session title is generated.

PromptTemplate.description: Overrides the Liquid template for TemplatePrompt profiles.

ChatDeploymentName.description: Overrides the chat deployment technical name.

UtilityDeploymentName.description: Overrides the utility deployment technical name.

Properties.description: Overrides extended profile properties including AIProfileMetadata.

Profiles.description: The AI profiles to create or update from Profile templates. Each entry starts from the selected template and then applies any explicitly provided overrides.
